description:
Add `!.automaker/features/**/feature.json` to .gitignore so feature data is version-controlled. This prevents total data loss when the .automaker/features/ directory is wiped (as happened during the 9+ agent crash on Feb 10).

Acceptance criteria:
- .gitignore updated with exclusion rule
- Existing feature.json files (once created) are tracked by git
- agent-output.md and images remain gitignored
- Test: create a feature, verify feature.json shows in `git status`
title: Git-track feature.json files to prevent data loss
